use rayon::prelude::*;

struct LargeState {
    data: Vec<u8>,
    index: HashMap<u64, Vec<usize>>,
    config: Config,
}

// BAD: move closure capturing large owned values
fn process_batch(state: LargeState, items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    items.par_iter()
        .map(move |item| {
            // Each thread gets a clone of the entire state
            let result = state.lookup(item.key);
            transform(result)
        })
        .collect()
}

fn analyze_chunks(text: String, chunks: &[Range<usize>]) -> Vec<Analysis> {
    chunks.par_iter()
        .map(move |range| {
            let slice = &text[range.clone()];
            analyze(slice)
        })
        .collect()
}
